notes:
Sampled from a 477-session real dump. Includes one row per agent (claude, codex, opencode) plus one multi-model session. Key per-agent quirks observed:
- claude.period is the session UUID; metadata.lastActivity is date-only (YYYY-MM-DD).
- codex.period is a path-like string like '2026/03/13/rollout-2026-03-13T05-48-02-<uuid>'; UUID is the last hyphen-delimited block. metadata.lastActivity is full ISO timestamp.
- opencode.period is 'ses_<short-id>'; metadata.lastActivity is undefined (omit from event_ts; fall back to current time minus a safety lag in the parser).
- modelBreakdowns array always present and ordered. Per-model fields are 'cost' (not 'totalCost') and 'modelName' (not 'model').
